issue.title: job.rikunabi.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://job.rikunabi.com/?mode=intern](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjob.rikunabi.com%2F%3Fmode%3Dintern) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/50imqw1qyps0k44ss84gs4wc0koc4k4syxqve7iles.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.18 System version: | `26.4` License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Japanese filter Advanced protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.cloudflare.com/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/ios/filters/15.txt`

issue.title: doordash.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Android

### AdGuard version

*

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed analytics or tracker

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Brave

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.doordash.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

https://423b12fd7b819ec52acafed4ef462cb2.doordash.com/iguazu-edge/v1/p2

suggested filter: ||doordash.com/iguazu (we have dns filter iguazu.doordash.com)


type in a random street address and press enter to see this tracker.

### Privacy
